info.name: Auth Module - Immobilier API
info.description:
Complete authentication module endpoints for the Immobilier.ch API.

This collection includes all auth endpoints with various test scenarios using seeded data.

**Test Credentials:**
- Super Admin: superadmin.en@immobilier.ch / Password123!
- Platform Admin: platformadmin1.en@immobilier.ch / Password123!
- Agency Admin: agencyadmin1.en@immobilier.ch / Password123!
- Agent: agent1.en@immobilier.ch / Password123!
- Owner: owner1.en@immobilier.ch / Password123!
- End User: user1.en@immobilier.ch / Password123!

request.description: Register a new end user account.
Register with French language preference and Accept-Language header.
Attempt to register with an existing email (seeded super admin).
Attempt to register with an invalid email format.
Attempt to register with a weak password.
Attempt to register with missing required fields.
Login as super admin user.
Login as platform admin user.
Login as agency admin user with agency_id.
Login as agent user.
Login as property owner user.
Login as end user.
Login as French-speaking user.
Login as German-speaking user.
Login as Italian-speaking user.
Attempt login with wrong password.
Attempt login with non-existent user.
Attempt login without email.
Refresh access token using valid refresh token.
Attempt to refresh with invalid token.
Attempt to refresh without providing token.
Get current user profile for super admin.
Get current user profile for end user.
Get current user profile for agency admin.
Attempt to get profile without authentication.
Attempt to get profile with invalid token.
Update user's first and last name.
Update user's preferred language.
Attempt to update profile without authentication.
Change password for authenticated user.
Attempt to change password with wrong current password.
Attempt to change to a weak password.
Attempt to change password without authentication.
Logout and invalidate the access token.
Attempt to logout without authentication.

exec: // This test verifies that the token is blacklisted after logout
// Note: This test should be run AFTER the 'Logout - Valid' test

request.description: Attempt to use a token after logout (should fail if token blacklisting is working).
